common.secretHint: Leave empty to keep the current value.
common.noEditPermission: You don't have permission to edit settings.

general.title: General settings
general.desc: Site info, contact and global controls
general.site_description_hint: Used as the default description in search results and social shares (SEO) for pages without their own.
general.maintenance_mode_desc: Disables the public site only — admin stays available.

branding.title: Branding
branding.dropHint: Drag a file here or click to choose
branding.allowedLogos: Accepted: PNG, JPG, WEBP — up to 2MB

regenerate.title: Regenerate media derivatives
regenerate.description: After changing watermark settings, regenerate derivatives (thumb/medium/watermarked) for all existing images. Runs in the background.
regenerate.confirmText: All library images will be reprocessed in the background. This may take a while depending on volume.

mediaStorage.title: Hybrid media storage
mediaStorage.desc: Local is always canonical; remote storage is an optional mirror.
mediaStorage.statusDesc: Remote mirror health and live media state counters.
mediaStorage.healthDownHint: Remote storage is enabled but the mirror is unreachable — likely wrong credentials. Check the key/secret, then save.
mediaStorage.saveReminder: Test passed — click "Save changes" to apply the credentials (testing alone does not save them).
mediaStorage.unsyncedDesc: Some files have not been mirrored to remote storage yet. Start a sync to clear the backlog.
mediaStorage.toggleDesc: When enabled, new media is saved locally then uploaded to the mirror in the background.
mediaStorage.remote_enabled_desc: Test the connection before enabling to avoid mirror failures.
mediaStorage.connDesc: Cloudflare R2 or any S3-compatible storage. Secrets are protected and never revealed.
mediaStorage.remote_use_path_style_desc: Enable for S3-compatible providers that require path-style URLs.
mediaStorage.testHint: Writes, reads, then deletes a probe object.
